SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:19am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Apellant, Charmaine Leonard, appears Pro Per. Respondent, Jocelyn MocQuant, appears Pro Per. Parties are previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.

EXHA(a): envelope containing itemized letter regarding security deposit.

Witness for Respondent: Stephanie Hawk.

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
